title: ACHR Retail Trader Frenzy Tesla Speculation
text: Archer Aviation stock fueled retail trader frenzy on Tesla tie-up speculation. Social media video featuring Archer's Midnight eVTOL aircraft alongside Tesla products sparked rumors of collaboration driving significant stock price spike. Tesla added fuel with teaser clip showing spinning turbine-like image with Tesla logo, hinting at major reveal. Retail investors and traders heavily engaged with ACHR trading volumes exceeding 20 million shares daily reflecting fund inflows and retail interest amid defense-tech enthusiasm. Stock volatility tied to upcoming quarterly earnings and regulatory milestones. Neither Tesla nor Archer Aviation officially confirmed potential partnership, leaving speculation primarily driven by social media and investor enthusiasm rather than fundamental business developments. This kind of retail sentiment can amplify price swings around key catalyst events.
